assertions.assertion: Mentions audience mismatch as a common cause
Mentions the importance of ValidTypes = ['at+jwt'] and warns about JWT confusion attacks without it
Mentions scope claim format inconsistency — space-delimited vs array — as a cause of silent authorization failures
assertions.rationale: Space-delimited scope issue is Duende-specific nuance.

assertions.assertion: Mentions checking the middleware pipeline ordering (UseAuthentication before UseAuthorization)
